name: Magic Jewels Castle
description: Embark on a magical match-3 adventure! Swap and match colorful jewels to restore a whimsical castle and village. Use rainbow balls, candy bombs, and other boosters to blast through hundreds of levels. Collect resources to rebuild houses, towers, and more—unlock new areas as you progress. With vibrant graphics and endless fun, this enchanted journey is easy to pick up and impossible to put down!
instructions: Swap amp Match Swap adjacent jewels to match 3 of the same color Use Boosters Tap rainbow balls candy bombs or potions to clear obstacles Progress Complete level goals to unlock new areas and rebuild the castle Simple fun and magical
